name: Samsara Beach
whyFit: One of Italy's most famous beach clubs. Daily DJ sets, international artists. Heavy electronic orientation — lower priority for acoustic but big name.

name: Cotriero Beach & Risto Pub
whyFit: Active since 1998. Regular live concerts, DJ sets, sunset aperitivos with music. Multiple genres. The sunset aperitivo format aligns perfectly with acoustic/RAV performances.

name: Zen Beach Gallipoli
whyFit: Upscale boutique beach club with fusion cuisine. Music is core — 'sole, musica, sabbia finissima'. Happy hour programming. More intimate than Samsara.

name: Lido Leucasia Golden Beach
location: Via Carpignano Salentino, Torre Lapillo, 73010 Porto Cesareo (LE)
whyFit: Confirmed live music Thu/Fri evenings: Pop, Blues, Jazz, Rock. Yoga sessions (Tue/Fri 18-19:30) followed by aperitivo. Yoga+aperitivo format perfect for sound healing positioning.

name: Balnearea Beach
whyFit: Daily afternoon music on beach, sunset aperitif with DJ sets. Daytime beach club, nighttime cocktail bar. Natural oasis of Alimini lakes.

name: Lido La Castellana
whyFit: Elegant, private beach club along Otranto's rugged coast. Refined atmosphere perfect for acoustic/intimate sunset sessions.

name: Gibo Luxury Club
whyFit: Spectacular cliff-over-sea setting at Ciolo. DJs and artists of national/international fame. House, dance, live sets. Dramatic location.

name: Samarinda Fine Beach
location: Lungomare Cristoforo Colombo, Marina di Leuca, 73040 (LE)
whyFit: Tagline: 'a beach house made of music'. Lounge bar + fine seafood + unforgettable vibes by the sea. STRONG FIT for acoustic/RAV sunset sessions.

name: Lido Azzurro Leuca
location: Via C. Colombo, 73040 Marina di Leuca (LE)
whyFit: Historic venue (1960s). Jazz, Blues, Soul selections. Summer live music and DJ sets. Jazz/Blues/Soul orientation matches acoustic/handpan well.

name: Le Cinque Vele Beach Club
whyFit: High-end venue with SPA at 'Maldive del Salento'. Jazz dinner shows. Direct match for acoustic/intimate performance. Tourist-heavy in summer.

name: Lido Coco Loco
location: Marina di Ugento, near Torre San Giovanni (LE)
whyFit: True chiringuito format between Pescoluse and Gallipoli. DJ sets, Sunday aperitivo with music. Salento cuisine. Sunday aperitivo = acoustic set opportunity.

name: Torre del Porticciolo Camping Village
whyFit: 4-star camping village inside Porto Conte Nature Reserve. NEEDS 6 NIGHTS/WEEK entertainment July-August. Piano bar and live music evenings. Stage in main square facing the sea. Season: 22 Jun - 6 Sep. RESIDENCY OPPORTUNITY.
